title: Preset UX: expose preset selection in dispatcher
description: Add preset selection to the transient dispatcher. Apply @preset cookies via gptel--transform-apply-preset. Include ogent-flavored presets registered via gptel-make-preset.

title: Tool + reasoning blocks: integrate gptel-highlight-mode
description: Reuse gptel-highlight-mode and block types (#+begin_tool, #+begin_reasoning) so tool calls and reasoning streams appear inline with folding support.

title: Docs: user-facing guide for gptel integration
description: Add a user-facing guide under docs/ covering API keys, backend customization via ogent-models.el, and how to define organization-specific presets.

title: Cancellation/retries: add abort and retry commands
description: Provide commands that look up request IDs in ogent-ui--request-table and call the appropriate gptel abort helper. Allow retrying failed requests.

title: Implement ogent-onboard command for provider setup
description: Create an interactive onboarding command that guides users through setting up their first model provider (starting with Anthropic). Should handle API key configuration, backend setup, and verification.

title: FSM + status UI: show gptel progress in block metadata
description: Bubble up gptel-send--handlers signals (WAIT/TYPE/DONE/ERRS) into header-line or block metadata so users can see progress and latency per model.
